rows.label: qev051301_MSG0001
rows.name: I'm glad to see you came, as promised.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0002
rows.name:
Allow me to introduce you.
This is my master, Adolphus.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0003
rows.name:
I would love nothing more than to share a
drink and exchange greetings, but time is of
the essence. Let's get straight to business.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0004
rows.name:
There are new rumors
regarding the Celeste Three.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0005
rows.name:
A group of men monopolizing white gold—
Or rather, *were* monopolizing it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0006
rows.name:
That's right. It seems they
are no longer in this world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0007
rows.name:
However, the rumor is that their treasure
still sleeps behind a door secured with
an incredibly robust security system.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_JNK0010
rows.name: Nod

rows.label: qev051301_SEL0011
rows.name: Nod emphatically, indicating you know the story well.

rows.label: qev051301_JNK0020
rows.name: Guess

rows.label: qev051301_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask if he wants to open that door.

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0008
rows.name:
Impressive. It seems capable
BLADEs are also well-informed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0009
rows.name:
Very perceptive. Just what I'd
expect from a capable BLADE
chosen by the capable Ga Biyu.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0010
rows.name:
Now, regarding the
details of this request.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0011
rows.name:
I want you to gather the four
keys required to open that door.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0012
rows.name:
You will be thoroughly compensated.
How does 5,000,000G sound?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_JNK0030
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev051301_SEL0031
rows.name: State that you have no objections.

rows.label: qev051301_JNK0040
rows.name: Negotiate

rows.label: qev051301_SEL0041
rows.name: Demand an even higher reward.

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0013
rows.name:
Then we have a deal. I appreciate
someone who understands quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0014
rows.name:
It's a fact that white gold is
famous in the market for its
wildly fluctuating prices.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0015
rows.name:
I fully expected you to try
and gouge me for more.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0016
rows.name:
Hmph... I suppose complaining
just for the sake of it is
one way to handle things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0017
rows.name:
It's standard procedure for
this line of work, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0018
rows.name:
It is true that the price of white gold
is unstable, even within the rare metal
market. I am well aware of that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0019
rows.name:
I understand your desire to ask for
more, but I am in the same boat. I am
taking on an equal amount of risk.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0020
rows.name:
The deal is fifty-fifty. That is a
fact, and I will not budge on it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0021
rows.name: I expect you to understand my position.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0022
rows.name:
Your objective is to secure
the four keys. Please begin
your operation immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0023
rows.name:
I shall simply wait here
for your good news.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0024
rows.name:
The next time we meet... will
likely be in front of the vault.
I'm looking forward to it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0025
rows.name:
Regarding the whereabouts of
the keys... I actually have a
rough idea of where they are.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0026
rows.name:
Just to confirm... it is true that
you are already in possession of
three of the four keys, is it not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0027
rows.name:
My master is unaware of this fact, but
you don't need to hide it from me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0028
rows.name:
It is precisely because I
knew this that I decided to
entrust this request to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0029
rows.name:
You have three keys, and I
will provide you with information
regarding the final one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0030
rows.name:
The idea is to share the benefits
with each other now, and share the
ultimate profit in the end.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0031
rows.name:
All I ask is a cut of the share. I understand
that this is a far wiser approach than fighting
and wounding each other over the keys.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_JNK0050
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev051301_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask why she hasn't told Adolphus the truth.

rows.label: qev051301_JNK0060
rows.name: Tease

rows.label: qev051301_SEL0061
rows.name: Joke about Ga Biyu being quite the schemer.

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0032
rows.name:
Please trust me, the one who
brought this job to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0033
rows.name:
My master reaps massive profits, but I
only receive a tiny fraction of it—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0034
rows.name:
In order to improve the lives of the Lars,
I need as large a reward as possible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0035
rows.name:
You stand to gain a massive reward
just by gathering one more key.
Surely you have no complaints?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0036
rows.name:
That's hardly the case. My master is
far more of a villain than I am.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0037
rows.name: However, he is also a man of power.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0038
rows.name:
In order to improve the lives
of the Lars, I simply want
to earn a larger reward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0039
rows.name: Does that satisfy your curiosity?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0040
rows.name:
Now, regarding the information
on the final key—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0041
rows.name:
It seems a male BLADE
named Law possesses it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0042
rows.name:
He is a member of a team led by a man named
Wan. I've confirmed that they are currently
on an expedition in the White Tree Continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0043
rows.name:
Since you are also a BLADE, it should be
easy for you to approach Wan's team.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0044
rows.name:
Working alongside them for a while
might be an effective strategy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0045
rows.name:
At any rate, I leave the methods to you.
As far as we're concerned, as long as we
get the key, that's all that matters.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051301_MSG0046
rows.name: I expect success.[ST:wait ]
